title: Diamond Painting Brush, Diamond Art Cleaning Brush, Art Diamond Craft Accessories for Picker Organiser Spilled Diamonds
features: Material Made: The diamond painting accessory tool is made of plastic, sturdy and durable, easy to clean from the top and reach corners. Lightweight, very compact, cute and easy to carry.

Collect Diamond Beads: The small dustpan used for diamond painting can be used as a funnel for collecting diamonds. Suitable for all kinds of diamonds, square diamonds, round diamonds, crystal diamonds, glass diamonds, etc., can easily organize small diamonds on the desktop.

Easy to use: The diamond painting storage tray and brush can help you collect spilled diamonds and beads, if you accidentally spill diamonds, you can easily collect diamonds and organize small diamonds on the table easily and efficiently.

Easy to hang: The handle of the cleaning brush is a round hanging hole, allowing you to hang them on doors, walls or other places. The comfortable, matching design allows you to place the broom inside the dustpan for convenient storage and space saving.

Wide application: Diamond painting trays and brushes can not only be used as diamond painting cleaning brushes, but also can be used to clean desks, tables, countertops, cabinets, sofas, keyboards, cars, etc., which can help you and your home residents ensure a clean and tidy home living environment.
description: Feature 1. The small dustpan used for diamond painting can be used as a funnel for collecting diamonds. Suitable for all kinds of diamonds, square diamonds, round diamonds, crystal diamonds, glass diamonds, etc., can easily organize small diamonds on the desktop. 2. Specification Package included: 1 x brush + 1 x storage compartment. Size: Brush 14.5 x 7.8 cm/5.7 x 3.07 inches. Storage compartment 11.3 x 9.6 cm. Color: pink/green/blue Material: ABS
